scenario.name: Dialog Auto PRACK Multi-ToTag UAS
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying Via:[$hdr_via] From:[$hdr_from] To:[$hdr_to];tag=[service].[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$hdr_cseq] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 180 Ringing Via:[$hdr_via] From:[$hdr_from] To:[$hdr_to];tag=desk.[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$hdr_cseq] Require: 100rel RSeq: 1 Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 180 Ringing Via:[$hdr_via] From:[$hdr_from] To:[$hdr_to];tag=mobile.[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$hdr_cseq] Require: 100rel RSeq: 2 Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via:[$hdr_via] From:[$hdr_from] To:[$hdr_to];tag=mobile.[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq:[$hdr_cseq] [last_Record-Route:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000
